title: OP craft and items
description: You've never seen such an overpowered mod; this is the best mod we've ever had.
body:
OP items include:

- OP Sword

- A block (Bedbock) that only MODERATORs can obtain
- Desert Eagle Mod

- Diamond Rod

- OP Pickaxe

- Mace Recipe

- Briefly describing these items:

- The OP Sword has 0.5 attack speed, 1 health, and 1000 attack damage, and is crafted with 1 diamond rod and 2 diamond blocks.

- The block called Bedbock can only be obtained by MODERATORs; it is forbidden and dangerous for a normal person to obtain it.

- The Desert Eagle Mod is difficult to craft but powerful, works with Spectral Arrow, and is quite easy to use.

- The diamond rod was added to craft the OP Pickaxe, but it can also be used in Mace crafting.

- The OP Pickaxe, despite having 50 health, breaks incredibly fast, shattering 30 obsidian in seconds.

- The Mace Recipe doesn't contain much; it includes 3 glass bottles, 1 candle, and 1 OP Sword, and a Mace is created.
